OPNSENSE_HOST.description: URL of the OPNsense instance (include https://)

OPNSENSE_API_KEY.description: OPNsense API key (used as Basic Auth username)

OPNSENSE_API_SECRET.description: OPNsense API secret (used as Basic Auth password)

OPNSENSE_WRITE_ENABLED.description: Set to "true" to enable write operations (default: false)

OPNSENSE_VERIFY_SSL.description: Set to "false" for self-signed certificates (default: true)
